title: ophrys oxyrrhynchos subsp. biancae
intro: Ophrys oxyrrhynchos subsp. biancae is a plant species found in the Mediterranean region, belonging to the orchid family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat various ailments such as digestive issues, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Ophrys oxyrrhynchos subsp. biancae include infusions, tinctures, and creams, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
